item.title: A template for using NixOS in a homelab
item.author: mikey-boy
item.description: Last year I bought a used Lenovo ThinkStation P510 from BestBuy to replace my cluster of RPIs that I had running in my home. With this change, I wanted a more reliable configuration for my services instead of the ad-hoc approach I took previously. One of the main challenges I encountered was trying to troubleshoot a broken service that I configured 6 months ago and remembering all the changes I had previously made. This is how I stumbled upon NixOS and from my experience it has the following pros & cons.
